author: mark
text:
stash artifact at `wip/bl-e802-stash` (commit 30f79c5) carries:

- `src/commands/init.rs`: 8-line diff that flips `Store::init` → `Store::init_xdg` (the entire scope of the 'flip' part of this phase).
- `src/worktree.rs`: 9-line addition guarding `link_shared_state` on the XDG layout — under XDG nothing is balls-shaped inside the worktree, and symlinking `.balls/local`, `.balls/state-repo`, `.balls/tasks` into a worktree leaves untracked entries that break `bl drop` (verified: pre-fix, agent_lifecycle::story_63 hit 'worktree has uncommitted changes' on a clean claim+drop). The guard is needed alongside the flip.

Apply: `git stash apply wip/bl-e802-stash` after 1B-4 lands, keep src/commands/init.rs + src/worktree.rs changes only. The full §14.19 lifecycle gate (init → create → claim → review → close, zero balls: commits on main) is unwritten and is the rest of this slice.

author: mark
text: Phase 1B-5: flip cmd_init to Store::init_xdg + close §14.19 lifecycle gate
